PlayerHolder.description: Contains most player-specific data during a race. The central per-player data structure.

Player.description: Base player class with kart physics, movement, and state. PlayerBike is the bike variant.

PlayerPhysics / PlayerPhysicsBike.description: Handles kart/bike physics including speed, acceleration, steering, drifting, and surface interactions.

PlayerBoost.description: Manages boost state (mushroom, trick, start boost, etc.) with multiplier and speed limit.

PlayerTrick / PlayerTrickBike.description: Handles trick/stunt animations including flips, rotations, and boost ramp.

PlayerSub10 / PlayerSub10Bike.description: Player sub-structure (~0x10 size offset) with Remote and RealLocal variants. Contains additional movement state.

PlayerSub14 / PlayerSub18 / PlayerSub1c.description: Additional player sub-structures for item, wheelie, and other gameplay state.

PlayerPointers.description: Holds pointers to various player sub-objects and state.

PlayerParams.description: Stores kart/bike parameter data (from KartParam.bin and parts display params).

WheelPhysics / WheelPhysicsHolder.description: Wheel physics and suspension. Wheel0 and Wheel1 are 3D object variants.

CollisionData / Hitbox / HitboxGroup.description: Collision detection data and hitbox management.

StatsAndBsp / GpStats.description: Stats tracking and BSP (Binary Space Partition) data.

Racedata / RacedataMain.description: Holds race setup info: game mode, character/vehicle selections, settings. Extends ParameterFile. Total size 0x73f0.

RacedataScenario.description: Contains 12 player entries, race settings, mission data, and ghost file pointer. Size 0xbf0.

RacedataPlayer.description: Per-player race data: vehicle/character ID, player type, team, score, rating. Size 0xf0.

RacedataSettings.description: Race settings struct: course ID, engine class, game mode, battle type, CPU mode, item mode, lap count, etc. Size 0x34.

Raceinfo.description: Stores live race info: player positions, lap times, race completion, stage (intro/countdown/race), timers.

RaceinfoPlayer.description: Per-player race state: position, lap, checkpoint, race completion fraction, battle score, frame counter, finish times. Size 0x54.

Timer / TimerManager.description: Race timing (minutes/seconds/ms) and timer management with 3 timer slots.

GmDataOnlineVs / GmDataOnlineVsPlayer.description: Online VS mode-specific game data with position tracking and race finish times.

InputData.description: Handles all controller inputs. 4 real controllers + 12 virtual. Total size 0x415c.

ControllerHolder / RealControllerHolder.description: Per-controller input state: buttons, stick, triggers. Real controllers read hardware; virtual store remote player inputs.

InputState.description: Raw and processed input: buttonActions, buttonRaw, stick X/Y, quantized stick, motion control. Size 0x18.

RKNetController.description: Main network controller: DWC integration, RACE packet handling, connection management, friend roster, VR/BR.

PacketHolder / SplitRACEPointers.description: RACE packet buffer management: header, raceHeader1/2, roomSelect, racedata, user, item, event sections.

SELECTHandler.description: Handles SELECT packets for course voting, team/battle/CC decisions, and aid-to-player mapping.

ROOMHandler.description: Handles ROOM packets for room management (host/guest roles, register, chat, join messages).

EVENTHandler.description: Handles EVENT packets for in-race events (item usage, hits, etc.). 24 send entries, 12*24 receive entries.

ITEMHandler.description: Handles ITEM packets for item get/clear broadcasting.

USERHandler.description: Handles USER packets for player profile data exchange (Mii, VR/BR, etc.).

MiscPacketHandler.description: Handles RACEHEADER1/2, RACEDATA packets, lag frame processing, countdown timer, EVENT forwarding.

ItemSlotData.description: Processes ItemSlot.bin for item roulette probabilities. Manages spawn timers (lightning, blue shell, blooper, POW).

ItemBehaviour.description: Describes how each item behaves (use type, object ID, item count, draggability). 19-entry table.

Random.description: Game's RNG class with next() and nextLimited() methods. Base for RaceinfoRandom.

key_enums: GameMode (GRAND_PRIX, VS_RACE, TIME_TRIAL, BATTLE, MISSION_TOURNAMENT, GHOST_RACE, PRIVATE_VS, PUBLIC_VS, PUBLIC_BATTLE, PRIVATE_BATTLE, AWARD, CREDITS)
RKNetConnectionState (STATE_SHUTDOWN, LOGIN_START, LOGIN_AUTHORISED, LOGIN_FRIENDS_SYNCED, MATCHING, FAILED, ERROR)
key_structs: SELECTPlayer (prevFinishPos, score, character, vehicle, trackVote, starRank) - 0x8
EVENTEntry (timestamp, data[21], state, objectNumber, action, dataLength) - 0x20

pal_address_summary.description: All addresses are for PAL version of the game

address_ranges.0x8051xxxx-0x8055xxxx: Race logic, player physics, RNG, timer
address_ranges.0x8057xxxx-0x8058xxxx: Player boost, trick, kart movement functions
address_ranges.0x8065xxxx-0x8066xxxx: Network handlers (RKNet, ROOM, SELECT, EVENT, ITEM, USER, MiscPacket)
address_ranges.0x807bxxxx: Item slot data, item behaviour setup
address_ranges.0x809bxxxx-0x809cxxxx: Static instance pointers and global data

critical: PlayerHolder/Player - Core gameplay state, physics, movement
Racedata - Race configuration and player selections
Raceinfo - Live race state (positions, laps, timing)
medium: RKNetController - Online networking (if online support desired)
All network handlers (SELECT, ROOM, EVENT, ITEM, USER, MiscPacket)
